meta.provider: GCP Cloud Logging (Cloud Run structured JSON)
meta.incident: Pub/Sub topic UNAVAILABLE: escalating publish latency -> gRPC UNAVAILABLE errors -> order events not delivered to inventory-service (silent inventory reservation skips) -> order pipeline halted; concurrent Cloud Storage 503 retry distractor on invoice uploads

ground_truth.desc: Pub/Sub publish latency escalating well past 200ms threshold

ground_truth.needle: unavailable: channel pipeline closed while sending
ground_truth.desc: gRPC channel to Pub/Sub broken, all publishes failing
downstream inventory-service missed order events causing silent reservation skips

ground_truth.needle: pubsub topic unavailable: all publish attempts exhausted
ground_truth.desc: order pipeline halted, manual intervention required
recurring benign Cloud Storage 503 retry distractor unrelated to Pub/Sub outage
